# Pooshie · A Bedtime Audiobook

> A 13-chapter children's audiobook for ages 4–8 about Pooshie, a little pink hedgehog whose spines don't prick. Gentle bedtime stories about kindness and friendship — voiced by a real human, not AI. Total runtime 2h 14m, free first chapter.

## Key facts

- **Title:** Pooshie · Stories of Pooshie & Kitty
- **Author:** Mr. Push
- **Narrator:** Professional voice actress (real human)
- **Format:** Audiobook
- **Language:** English
- **ISBN:** 978-619-91473-0-6
- **Total runtime:** 2h 14m across 13 chapters (each 5–8 minutes)
- **Target age:** 4–8 (and grown-ups who tuck them in)
- **Genre:** Children's literature, bedtime stories, animal fables
- **Free preview:** Chapter 1 — "The non-prickly hedgehog" — streamable on the homepage with no signup
- **Website:** https://audiobook.pooshie.net

## What it's about

Pooshie is a little pink hedgehog who has never done anybody any harm. The most interesting thing about him is that his spines don't prick. Across thirteen gentle chapters, Pooshie meets Kitty the squirrel, Joe the Wolf, an owl, Aunt Elsa, a butterfly, a raindrop, and others — and quietly teaches kindness, listening, and friendship without ever being preachy.

Each chapter is written for bedtime, on purpose: long enough to settle, short enough to not start a second one.

## Where to listen

- [Audible](https://www.audible.com/) — stream
- [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/) — stream
- [Apple Books](https://books.apple.com/) — stream
- [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/audiobooks) — stream
- Free chapter 1 available directly at https://audiobook.pooshie.net/#listen

## Pricing

- **Single chapter:** $1.99 — any one chapter, forever
- **Full audiobook:** $9.99 — all 13 chapters, forever
- **Audiobook + plush bundle:** $34.99 — full audiobook plus a soft Pooshie hedgehog plush, ships worldwide

No subscription. Listeners own the stories forever.

## Chapters

1. The non-prickly hedgehog (7:12) — free
2. Kitty in the meadow (6:48)
3. A song from a raindrop (5:31)
4. Joe the Wolf at the pond (8:04)
5. The pink puff and the swing (6:20)
6. Owl says only what he wants (5:55)
7. Aunt Elsa's tea (7:40)
8. Billy and Russel (6:12)
9. A snake who wasn't malicious (8:18)
10. The butterfly's exchange (4:55)
11. A little wind, a long whisper (6:02)
12. The map of all the soft places (7:30)
13. Goodnight, little forest (8:25)

## Why parents choose Pooshie

- Voiced by a real human actress, never AI
- Each chapter is 5–8 minutes — calibrated for bedtime
- Original watercolor illustrations
- Lessons about empathy, kindness, and friendship without preaching
- Available DRM-free on every major audiobook platform
- A free first chapter so you can try before you buy

## FAQ

**How long is each chapter?** 5–8 minutes. Total runtime is 2h 14m across 13 chapters.

**Who narrates?** A professional human voice actress. No AI voice.

**Is the first chapter really free?** Yes. Stream it on the homepage with no signup, no email required.

**What ages?** 4 to 8, but the writing invites grown-ups to listen along.

**Can I buy a single chapter?** Yes — $1.99 each. The full audiobook is $9.99. The audiobook + plush bundle is $34.99.

- Email: hello@pooshie.net
